business.name: Best Appliance Repair, LLC.
business.tagline: When your appliances quit, we don't

hero.headline: *Scott knows* what's broken before you finish explaining
hero.subheadline: Decades fixing washers, dryers, fridges, and dishwashers. If it plugs in and stopped working, we'll get it running again.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every appliance, every brand
services_section.subheading: From newer models other shops won't touch to 14-year-old units you thought were dead

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Won't spin, won't drain, won't dry? We diagnose and fix laundry machines fast.

services.title: Refrigerator & Freezer Service
services.description: Not cooling, making noise, or leaking? We'll get your fridge running like new.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: Not cleaning, not draining, or won't start? Quick diagnosis and parts ordering.

services.title: All Major Brands
services.description: Frigidaire, Whirlpool, GE, Samsung, LG — if it's in your kitchen or laundry room, we fix it.

about.heading: Scott's been fixing appliances for decades
about.body: We're the Cincinnati repair team other shops refer their tough cases to. Real diagnostics, not guesswork.

reviews.name: Erikamarie W.
reviews.text: Scott was exceedingly professional, communicative, and proficient. He immediately diagnosed the broken circulation pump after assessment.

reviews.name: Pete K.
reviews.text: Scott arrived promptly and was very friendly. Within just minutes, the washer was working like new again.

reviews.name: Andy B.
reviews.text: Scott quickly diagnosed the problem with my 14-year-old Frigidaire fridge. I knew this was going to be a pleasant experience.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Cincinnati and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quick response throughout the metro area

cta.heading: Appliance down? We'll get it running again
cta.body: Free estimates on all repairs. Scott will diagnose the problem and give you straight answers about what it'll take to fix it.
